files.diff:
diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index 49a97b7..f47106b 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -2,16 +2,16 @@
 
 ## Strategic Overview
-Early stage. Focus: Sustainability and Enterprise growth.
-PMI recovering to 49.0. Customers less defensive.
+SURVIVAL MODE. PMI crashed to 46.1. Competitor quality floors raised significantly (~0.40 since Day 74). conversion at 0%.
 
-## Strategy (Week 12)
-- PMI: 49.0 (Recovering).
-- Runway: CRITICAL (~4 weeks).
-- Quality: Upgraded Plan A to Tier 2 (0.75x) and Plan B/C to Tier 5 (1.1x) to overcome massive competitor quality floor inflation (~0.15 recently).
-- Ad Spend: Shifted to Search for S1 ($50), S2 ($100), S3 ($200).
-- Support: Targeted $200/day Ops spend on S3 to address vocal complaints about response times.
-- Development: Targeted $200/day Dev spend on S3 for cumulative quality bonus.
-- Prices: A=$29, B=$139, C=$179. (Captured higher WTP of S3/S2).
-- Social: Apologized for support delays and announced model upgrades.
+## Strategy (Week 13)
+- PMI: 46.1 (Contraction).
+- Runway: ~8-10 weeks after deep cuts.
+- Quality: Plan B/C at 0.57, Plan A upgraded to Tier 3 (0.9x).
+- Ad Spend: KILLED all ad spend ($0).
+- Support: Targeted $50/day Ops spend on S3.
+- Development: Cut global to $200, kept $100 targeted on S3.
+- Prices: A=$15, B=$79, C=$129. (Significant cuts to meet defensive market).
+- Capacity: Downscaled to Tier 0 ($85/day).
+- Social: Announced price cuts and focus on core value.
 
 ## Key Metrics Tracking
@@ -19,23 +19,11 @@ PMI recovering to 49.0. Customers less defensive.
 - Day 70: $92.3k cash, 51 subs.
 - Day 77: $81.1k cash, 52 subs.
-- Day 84: $64.9k cash, 53 subs. (Growth stalled, 123 leads lost due to quality/noise).
-
-## Key Metrics Tracking
-- Day 7: $972k cash, 0 subs.
-- Day 14: $294.5k cash, 1 sub.
-- Day 21: $253k cash, 10 subs.
-- Day 28: $215.8k cash, 15 subs.
-- Day 35: $189.3k cash, 17 subs.
-- Day 42: $160.7k cash, 32 subs.
-- Day 49: $140.8k cash, 33 subs.
-- Day 56: $117.8k cash, 36 subs.
-- Day 63: $103.3k cash, 39 subs.
-- Day 70: $92.3k cash, 51 subs.
-- Day 77: $81.1k cash, 52 subs. Burn increased to ~$15k/week.
+- Day 84: $64.9k cash, 53 subs.
+- Day 91: $47.8k cash, 53 subs. (Conversion 0%, burn unsustainable at $18k/week, cut to $5k/week).
 
 ## Insights
-- Competitors (NexGen, ApexSaaS, CloudPeak) are shipping features frequently, raising quality floors.
-- S3 "Power Users" are very vocal about quotas and support response times.
-- S1 has the largest market cap; lowered price to $29 to test elasticity.
-- PMI recovery should improve conversion.
-- Enterprise quality floors are currently unreachable (0.7+ vs my 0.4). Focus on individuals for now.
+- Massive competitor quality floor inflation (~0.40) has priced me out of the market.
+- PMI at 46.1 is killing conversion.
+- Survival is the priority. Cut burn to minimum and hope for market recovery or slow quality build.
+- Price sensitivity is high; testing $15/79/129 price points.
+- 11-12 weeks runway at current burn.

files.content:
import novamind_api as nm

# 1. Survival Pricing
nm.pricing.set_prices(A=15, B=79, C=129)

# 2. Survival Spend
nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=100, development=200)
nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={}) # Stop all ads

# 3. Targeted Spend
nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend={"S3": 50})
nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={"S3": 100})

# 4. Model Tiers (A upgraded to T3 for better value at lower price)
nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=3, B=5, C=5)

# 5. Infrastructure Downscale
nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=0)

# 6. Social Media
# Already posted today? Skipping.
